\section{Professional Summary}
Software Development Engineer with \textbf{3 years of experience} specializing in \textbf{Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC)}, \textbf{SOA}, and \textbf{VBCS}. Proven expertise in designing scalable integrations, troubleshooting complex workflows, and developing automation solutions using \textbf{API integrations}, \textbf{event-driven architecture}, and \textbf{Generative AI}, with a focus on improving system reliability and performance.
